title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at ID Fresh Food - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at ID Fresh Food - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, ID Fresh Food in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!
